quote: THIS IS A GREAT TIME TO BUY!!! DJT
context: Posted at 9:37am, less than four hours before Trump announced a 90-day pause on most tariffs. Markets surged on the pause; the S&P 500 closed up 9.5% and Trump Media (ticker DJT) closed up 22.67% that day.
flag: Followed by a 90-day tariff pause hours later

quote: Go out and buy a Dell computer.
context: Said during economic remarks at a rally in Rome, Georgia. Nine days earlier, Trump's disclosed trades show a purchase of $1 million to $5 million in Dell stock.
flag: Bought stock 9 days before the remarks

quote: It's a great honor being here. It's a great company.
context: Said while touring a Thermo Fisher facility in Reading, Ohio. Trump bought between $15,000 and $50,000 of Thermo Fisher stock that same day.

quote: Apple, a great company... Who the hell else could have done this? Nobody else.
context: Said at a rally in Hebron, Kentucky. Trump bought between $250,000 and $500,000 of Apple stock that same day.

quote: I just left the head of Micron. It's one of the hottest companies.
context: Said on Fox News' "The Five," a day after disclosed trades show Trump bought between $50,000 and $100,000 of Micron stock.

quote: Palantir Technologies (PLTR) has proven to have great war fighting capabilities and equipment. Just ask our enemies!!!
context: Posted as Palantir stock headed into its worst week in over a year amid the Iran conflict. Came weeks after Trump's account built a Palantir position in Q1 2026.
flag: Praise followed Q1 trading activity in the stock

context: Said at a Mother's Day luncheon while thanking the Dell family by name. Dell's stock hit a record high the day of the remarks.
flag: Repeated praise; stock hit record high same day
